name: Cheesy New Potatoes with Bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash potatoes thoroughly; do not peel.
2. Place potatoes in a small Dutch oven; cover with water.
3. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and cook about 20 minutes or until tender.
4. Drain well and cool slightly.
5. Cut into 1/4 inch slices.
6. In order listed: potatoes, bacon, cheese, butter, salt, and pepper, layer half of all ingredients in a 2 quart casserole.
7. Repeat layers.
8. Bake at 400 degrees for 15 minutes.
